header.title: Button
header.subtitle: Pill-shaped action element. Six visual variants, three sizes, and orthogonal modifiers for icon-only and loading states.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A button is composed of an optional leading icon, a label, and an optional trailing icon. All parts share the button's color and pill geometry.

parts.leading: Optional decorative or status icon shown before the label.
parts.label: Action verb in sentence case. Keep it short — one to three words.
parts.trailing: Optional indicator (chevron, arrow) hinting at outcome or direction.

variants.title: Variants
variants.description: Six visual treatments. Use default for the primary action; secondary, outline, and ghost for supporting actions; destructive for irreversible operations; link for inline navigation.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Three height presets. Default size is md. Use sm in compact toolbars and lg for hero CTAs.

icons.title: With icons
icons.description: Pair the label with a leading icon for context, a trailing icon to hint at flow, or both.

iconOnly.title: Icon-only
iconOnly.description: Square button at the same height as the size preset. Always pair with a descriptive aria-label.
iconOnly.ariaNote: When iconOnly is true, aria-label becomes a required prop — TypeScript enforces it via a discriminated union.

loading.title: Loading state
loading.description: While loading, the button is disabled and the label is replaced by a spinner. Width is preserved to avoid layout shift.

disabled.title: Disabled state
disabled.description: Reduced opacity and pointer-events:none. Use for actions that are temporarily unavailable, not as a substitute for hiding.

fullWidth.title: Full width
fullWidth.description: Stretches to fill its container. Common in stacked forms and mobile sheets.

props.title: Props
props.description: All standard ButtonHTMLAttributes are supported. Highlighted props below are component-specific.

props.iconOnly: Renders as a square button. Requires aria-label when true.
props.loading: Disables the button and overlays a centered spinner.
props.fullWidth: Stretches the button to fill its container width.
props.children: Label content. Combine with leading/trailing icons inline.
props.onClick: Click handler. Not invoked while loading or disabled.
props.extendsNote: Extends all standard ButtonHTMLAttributes (type, name, form, …).

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: Wrap every visible label with t() from useTranslations. The snippets here use literal strings for clarity.
